name: dispersed_repeat_line1
description: Long Interspersed Nuclear Element 1 (LINE-1, L1): autonomous retrotransposon, full-length ~6 kb, encoding ORF1 (RNA-binding) and ORF2 (endonuclease + reverse transcriptase). ~500000 copies in the human genome (~17% of DNA), most are 5' truncated. Subfamilies L1PA (primate-specific) and the still-active L1HS/L1PA1. AT-rich (GC ~0.42) relative to Alus. 3' polyA tail. Insertions are a known cause of human disease (e.g. haemophilia A, DMD).
